text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 37 

EXCLUDED_TIER_PRE_ICL 

LABEL: Excluded drugs are covered on this tier in the Pre ICL phase 

DESCRIPTION: For Enhanced Alternative plans that cover excluded drugs as a supplemental benefit, this variable 
Indicates whether the Part D plan provides coverage on this tier during the Pre-initial coverage limit 
(ICL) phase. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: EXCLUDED_TIER_PRE_ICL 

TYPE:
